gist.headline: Infinite canvas, infinite ideas
gist.blurb: Lkalma just landed in the community greenhouse. It's an AI-powered, offline-first collaborative whiteboard for sketching and sharing ideas without boundaries.
gist.summary: Added Lkalma, an AI-powered collaborative whiteboard, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore Lkalma's infinite canvas and offline-first sketching tools in the community directory.
gist.visual_concept: Lkalma is a whiteboard/sketching app on an infinite canvas. Visuals should include a large, glowing digital whiteboard or canvas. The Pollinations bee (Polly) wearing a little painter's beret, drawing or sketching on it alongside the Monitor Robot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, sketching on a glowing digital whiteboard alongside a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
